rationale: This addendum phase label is an umbrella table-of-contents description, not an independent route-level onset. The accepted occurrence fixture already contains 83 source-complete QBNR Phase 1 route occurrences and 38 source-complete Phase 2 route occurrences with exact route, treatment, date, and delivered scope. Linking this coarse phase label would add no distinct studyable fact and could create route-treatment cross-products, so this timeline-subject diagnostic is not applicable.
